tools-subtitle: Small web tools I've built. Useful, fun, or both.
tool-kh-desc: Work forwards from ingredients or backwards from the command or ability you want, with per-character ability tracking and a full crystal chart.
tool-bbs-tracker-desc: A full completion checklist — trophies, commands, game records, treasures, stickers, ice cream and Unversed missions for all three characters. Synced with the melding calculator.
tool-com-tracker-desc: Full completion checklist — trophies, sleights, cards, character files and minigames, tracked separately for Sora and Riku.
tool-kh2-tracker-desc: Full completion checklist — trophies, journal, treasures, puzzles, challenges, minigames, synthesis and gummi missions.
tool-kh1-tracker-desc: Full completion checklist — trophies, Jiminy's Journal, dalmatians, trinities, synthesis, treasures, keyblades, gummi missions and the Coliseum.
tool-ddd-tracker-desc: Full completion checklist — trophies, game records, Dream Eaters, commands, treasures, portals and Flick Rush, tracked separately for Sora and Riku.
tool-kh02-tracker-desc: Full completion checklist — trophies, all 51 objectives and their rewards, and every Dark World treasure.
tool-kh3-tracker-desc: Full completion checklist — trophies, the whole Gummiphone (Lucky Emblems, treasures, records and more), synthesis, cooking, gummi ship and the Re Mind DLC.
